reviews.comment:
Un desastre,  pedimos con mi padre dos hamburguesas para seguir viaje y hacer más rápido, tardaron más de media hora.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. My father and I ordered two hamburgers to continue our journey and make it faster, and they took more than half an hour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtazdhLXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pesima experiencia. Las playeras super mal educadas. Somos socios del Automovil Club y no podíamos estacionar en un lugar a la sombra a las 14 hs con casi 40 grados de calor para poder acceder a los servicios que como socios pagamos mensualmente. PESIMO PESIMO PESIMO

(Translated by Google)
Terrible experience. The attendants were incredibly rude. We are members of the Automobile Club and couldn't find a shady spot at 2 PM in almost 40-degree heat to access the services we pay for monthly as members. AWFUL, AWFUL, AWFUL.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtaGFudEt3EAE
